title: Vacancy: Inspector of Air Accidents (Human Factors)

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The Air Accidents Investigation Branch are recruiting an Inspector of Air Accidents (Human Factors) Are you an experienced human factors professional keen to apply your skills to accident investigation and help to make flying safer for all? If so, we invite you to apply for an exciting opportunity that has arisen at the Air Accidents Investigation Branch Headquarters in Aldershot, Hampshire. We are hiring for an Inspector of Air Accidents (Human Factors).

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: This is an excellent opportunity if you are looking for a unique and challenging role in the aviation industry where you will have the chance to contribute to real improvements in the aviation safety system. Read the full role profile and apply for this position at: Inspector of Air Accidents (Human Factors) - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK (reference number 433612)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Make sure to apply before 11:55 pm on Sunday 14 December 2025 to not miss out on this rare opportunity. Read more about our work here.

sourceReferences.citationText: aaib-bulletins – Vacancy: Inspector of Air Accidents (Human Factors)
